facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: South Third cordon at dusk, beside the active subsidence and newly opened street crack near Pell’s survey line

facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: Unranked, unlicensed salvage runner; shoulder still in sling and aggravated again after moving too fast and wrenching free of Bren, with ongoing head pain and strain from listening through the street; provisional notice and pending deposition unchanged; now has stronger field confirmation that the near return is faced built stone with another response beyond or below, and that South Third sits over a transferred bell foundation with sealed interior access

facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: Keep Pike’s contractors from locking the find into a false “simple collapse” report, secure Pell as a truthful procedural counterweight, and get the newly confirmed bell-foundation evidence aligned with Nessa’s archive trace before control of the site hardens

facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: Rowan still lacks money, license, sponsor, and lawful cordon access; Bren and Pike-side contractors are now openly hostile on-site; Hall Review and Pike remain in a race to control records and interpretation; Rowan still cannot publicly prove the full meaning of the structure without risking tighter seizure or being cut out entirely

facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: Lio remains a committed field ally and backs Rowan publicly against Bren; Nessa, still off-site in the archive system, successfully finds the shelf line and relays it to Pell; Darm Pell shifts from deniable contact to active procedural resistor after validating Rowan’s warning and suspending misleading strike notes; Mara Arl becomes a cautious civilian watcher tasked to monitor outgoing packets from the site

facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: The South Third struggle has escalated from theory to exposed evidence: a live street opening, deadened response, and archive confirmation of a sealed bell foundation have broken the simple-collapse narrative, and Rowan must now survive the fight over who gets to define, access, and own what lies below before the missing men and the structure are buried administratively
